chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-141 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For orders on maintainability of main case. ------ 14.05.2025 Petitioner Muhammad Siddique Mahar, present in person. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General, Sindh a/w Mansoor Ali Khokhar, Accountant, Municipal Committee, Naudero and Shoaib Ahmed, ADLG, Ratodero on behalf of RDLG, Larkana Division. ------ At the very outset, Accountant, Municipal Committee, Naudero through his statement dated 14.05.2025 files details of payment in respect of amount of commutation and LPR amounting to Rs.14,74,420.00, which have been paid to the petitioner in eight installments, such statement is taken on record, copy whereof has been provided to the petitioner, present in person. When confronted, petitioner admits that the entire dues have been cleared and paid to him, therefore, purpose of instant petition has been served; hence he does not wish to press it, which too is not opposed by learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Manzoor
